name: Operational Command Center
appropriateWhen: Users repeatedly monitor, triage, compare, and act on changing operational data.
inappropriateWhen: The main job is narrative reading, brand discovery, or a rare single-step action.
mobileStrategy: Promote exceptions and the primary action; convert wide comparisons to staged detail or intentional horizontal regions.
signatureMovePatterns: Use a real operational status, threshold, or exception as the visual organizing device.
forbiddenDefaults: oversized editorial headlines above dense work
